normalization.notes: Store Bamum text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep modern Bamum block characters separate from Bamum Supplement historical-stage characters until script-stage policy is reviewed.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Bamum syllabograms, script-stage metadata, syllable families, word chunks, and reviewer-approved cultural labels
segmentation.notes: Bamum has modern and historical encoded material. V1 should not mix script stages without expert review and clear learner framing.

sources.notes: Modern Bamum block metadata for syllabograms and punctuation. Use as infrastructure metadata only.

sources.license: Unicode License reviewed for metadata use
sources.notes: Historical-stage Bamum Supplement metadata. Use for scope decisions and avoid mixing into v1 without review.
Rendering and fallback test source. Not a text corpus.

sources.notes: Discovery source for script stages and encoding rationale. Do not copy examples into shipped content without review.
Short reviewed labels and examples authored by GlyphBridge with Bamum reviewer approval.
